title: [IV/MTS] Estrogen Away!
description: Allows Immersive Vehicles bullets to change the gender of everything within its blast radius!
body:
**Estrogen Away** is an integration addon inspired by **NTM: Vehicles** that allows IV/MTS bullets to change the gender of those caught in its blast radius

### How To Use
Add this to your bullet JSON
```json
"constantValues": {
  "estrogen": 1.0
}
```
Who all is affected is a radius calculated the same as the blast size of the explosive type!
